page_metadata.bioconda__summary: pyani provides a package and script for calculation of genome-scale average nucleotide identity.
page_metadata.biocontainers__summary: Pyani provides a package and script for calculation of genome-scale average nucleotide identity.
page_metadata.biotools__summary: pyani is a Python package and standalone program for calculation of whole-genome similarity measures. It is designed to be used with draft or complete prokaryote (bacterial and archaeal) genomes.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: pyani is a Python package and standalone program for calculation of whole-genome similarity measures. It is designed to be used with draft or complete prokaryote (bacterial and archaeal) genomes.
